creator: naddy@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Thanks, but... 

* xz should stay in sync as far as possible with the version imported 
into base in FreeBSD 8/9/10.  Unfortunately the latter doesn't correspond 
to an actual release, but 5.0.3 is the closest. 

* Most of xz is actually in the public domain. 

* Fetching from http://tukaani.org/xz/ simply hangs.
